# Product Last Price Info - Sale

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds the last sale info of the product.
\* Last Sale Price
\* Last Sale Date
\* Last Customer
